nodes.label: knit - Terminal UI for npx skills
nodes.rationale: knit exists because npx skills CLI is good for exact commands but lacks browsing, discovery, and management workflow. A TUI makes the loop faster because current state stays on screen without retyping commands.
nodes.norm_label: knit - terminal ui for npx skills

nodes.label: Code Reviewer Skill - Expert Code Review
nodes.norm_label: code reviewer skill - expert code review

nodes.label: KNIT Brand Logo
nodes.rationale: The logo-dark.png depicts the KNIT wordmark in a warm golden/yellow color (dominantly ~RGB 246,208,79) on a pure black background. It is the dark-mode variant of the project logo, complementing logo-transparent.png which renders the same wordmark in golden/amber (dominantly ~RGB 224,160,0) with a transparent background for light-mode use. Both logos are 1:1 aspect ratio square images centered around the styled 'KNIT' lettering, serving as the project's visual brand identity.

nodes.label: KNIT Brand Logo with Weave Motif
nodes.rationale: The logo-transparent.png is a 1024x1024 RGBA image with a transparent background. It features two distinct visual elements stacked vertically: (1) a large intricate geometric weave/knitting-stitch motif occupying ~78% of the content area, rendered in golden/amber (~RGB 251,173,15), and (2) the 'knit' wordmark in a clean typeface occupying the bottom ~22% in the same golden/amber color. The geometric motif's moderate bilateral symmetry (~60-73%) and alternating fill pattern suggests a stylized knitting stitch or woven-knot emblem, consistent with the project name. This transparent-background variant is designed for use on both light and dark backgrounds, complementing the solid-background wordmark-only logo-dark.png variant.
nodes.norm_label: knit brand logo with weave motif

nodes.label: Geometric Knitting Weave Emblem
nodes.rationale: The large geometric pattern at the top of the logo comprises alternating dense and sparse regions with ~47.5% fill within its bounding box, exhibiting moderate horizontal symmetry (0.60-0.73). The pattern's structure—with vertical bars, horizontal connectors, and alternating fill bands—evokes knitting stitches, crossed needles, or woven fibers, reinforcing the 'knit' brand metaphor of connecting and weaving together agent skills.

nodes.label: Golden Amber Brand Color
nodes.rationale: The logo uses a warm golden/amber color palette with mean RGB ~(251, 173, 15). Dominant simplified color buckets center around RGB(240, 176, 16) at 42.5% and RGB(240, 160, 16) at 16.6%, with a gradient spanning from deep amber (~RGB 224,128,0) to bright gold (~RGB 240,192,16). This warm metallic color scheme provides contrast on dark or light backgrounds and conveys a polished, premium brand identity.
